comment: Broad IAM policy for Exasol Personal development/testing on Exoscale. Grants full access to all required services.
note: Exoscale IAM policies are configured via the Portal or API (exoscale_iam_role resource). This JSON is provided as a reference for the required service permissions.
warning: This policy grants broad access. Use iam-policy.minimal.json for production deployments.

compute-legacy.comment: Full access to compute instances, templates, SSH keys, security groups, and private networks

block-storage.comment: Full access to block storage volumes and snapshots

sos.comment: Full access to Simple Object Storage (SOS) for archive volumes

iam.comment: Full access to IAM roles and API keys
